prayer:
Approach the cryo-chamber with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to stir its slumbering Machine Spirit.
Anoint the cryo-chamber's cryo-seals with blessed cryogel, invoking the rites of initialization.
Chant the binary litanies to commence the cryo-chamber initialization sequence.
Monitor the awakening hum of the cryo-chamber as its Machine Spirit aligns with the Motive Force.
Sanctify the completed initialization through auspex verification and hymn of purity.

Draw nigh unto the electoo in solemn procession, whispering the Canticle of Repose.
Invoke the Omnissiah's mercy upon the electoo's Machine Spirit for a controlled shutdown.
Sever the electoo's power conduits with sanctified mechadendrites, intoning the shutdown protocols.
Seal the electoo's circuits with wards against data-corruption during quiescence.
Confirm the electoo's shutdown through ritual diagnostics and offerings of incense.

Kneel before the Hellhound, offering mechano-praise to its ferocious Machine Spirit.
Anoint the Hellhound's inferno-tanks with promethium-blessed oils for startup rites.
Initiate the Hellhound startup sequence amid roaring litanies of ignition.
Beseech the Omnissiah to enflame the Hellhound's reactors with divine fury.
Verify the Hellhound's awakened roar through vox-chants and motive force harmonics.

Inspect and sanctify the Shadowsword post-maintenance through full diagnostic litanies.
